title: Financial Management
description: Track your income, expenses and profit
myInvoicesDescription: View your invoices and make payments
invoicesWillAppear: Your invoices will appear here when created
noInvoicesStudent: You have no invoices at the moment

modal.createDescription: The invoice will be automatically directed to the bank account configured for the selected student.

errors.amountMustBePositive: Amount must be greater than zero
errors.amountBelowMinimum: Minimum amount for boleto is R$ 5.00
errors.amountAboveMaximum: Maximum amount for boleto is R$ 49,999.99

markAsPaid.title: Confirm Manual Payment
markAsPaid.description: By confirming, this invoice will be marked as paid and the Stripe Payment Intent will be cancelled (if applicable). This action is irreversible.
markAsPaid.notesPlaceholder: E.g., Payment received in cash, bank transfer, etc.

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

connect.title: Stripe Connect Account
connect.description: Configure your Stripe account to receive payments

restricted.title: Account Restricted - Action Required
restricted.description: Your Stripe account has been restricted and new charges are disabled. Access Stripe dashboard to resolve pending issues.

charges_disabled.description: Charges are disabled for your account. You need to complete pending information.

payouts_disabled.description: Payouts are disabled for your account. You need to complete pending information.

pending.description: Your account is pending setup. Complete the required information.

stripe.function_disabled: This functionality is temporarily disabled until account regularization.

fees.alertDescription: Generated bank slips have a fixed Stripe fee of R$ 3.49 per transaction.
fees.deducted: This fee is automatically deducted and is already reflected in the amounts you will receive.
fees.exampleWith34Students: 💡 Example with {{students}} students and R$ {{amount}} invoices:

boleto.minimumAmountError: The minimum amount for boleto is R$ 5.00
boleto.maximumAmountError: The maximum amount for boleto is R$ 49,999.99
boleto.amountBelowMinimumStudent: This invoice amount ({{amount}}) is below the R$ 5.00 minimum for boleto. Use PIX instead.

paymentOptions.title: Payment Options
paymentOptions.boletoNotAvailable: Bank slip not available. Use PIX for faster payment with lower fees.
paymentOptions.boletoMinimumWarning: Minimum amount for bank slip is R$ 5.00. Use PIX or Card.
paymentOptions.overdueWarning: This invoice is overdue. Contact your teacher if you have questions.
paymentOptions.boletoOpenedNewTab: Bank slip opened in a new tab
paymentOptions.boletoPopupBlocked: Use the button below to open the bank slip (popup blocked)
paymentOptions.redirectingCard: You will be redirected to card payment
paymentOptions.pixGeneratedDescription: Use the QR code or PIX code to pay
